_doc: Permission + hook excerpt for ~/.gemini/settings.json. Merge these keys into your live settings.json; don't replace the whole file (it carries MCP servers, plugins, statusLine, etc.). Note: Gemini timeouts are in MILLISECONDS, not seconds.
_policyPaths_note: Tells Gemini where to load its TOML policy rules from. The actual policies live in this repo at gemini-policies/ — drop them at ~/.gemini/policies/.

general._defaultApprovalMode_note: auto_edit auto-approves edits but still prompts for shell. Don't set 'yolo' here — enum error at startup; yolo is a CLI flag only.

_hook_snippet: OPTIONAL human-in-the-loop relay (see ../docs/human-in-the-loop.md). Add to hooks.BeforeTool — merge with existing entries, don't replace the array. The matcher is wide because the adapter does the actual filtering — non-matching calls return allow silently. Point the command at your own relay; the placeholder below is not a real path.
